name: Dee Bus
districts_or_customers: Serves ~57 school districts across three counties in Boston/MetroWest area (per company materials); also referenced as 'over a dozen' districts in older sources
recent_news: Multi-generational family operator (Leo Dee 1946 -> son George Dee); grown to ~200 buses + 46 special-needs vans; Zonar case study highlights fleet technology adoption.
fit_notes: Strong MA in-state tuck-in candidate: family-owned, multi-generational, ~200+ bus fleet across MetroWest districts. Listed employee count (47) appears to be a single-location subset; true scale materially larger than record indicates. Likely platform-scale, not pure tuck-in, but attractive.

name: Westonka Bus Svc
owner_or_parent: 4.0 School Services (Mike Hennek, owner) - dba/subsidiary brand
districts_or_customers: Westonka Public Schools (Mound/Minnetrista/Spring Park/Navarre/Shorewood/Orono/Independence; ~2,250 students, 4 public + 1 private school)
recent_news: Operated since 2006 as a contracted operation under 4.0 School Services (fourpointo.com), a Minnesota school-services platform serving 28-30+ MN districts founded as Prairie Bus Service in 1994.
fit_notes: Not an independent target - it is a branded contract under 4.0 School Services (Mike Hennek). Real tuck-in opportunity would be the parent 4.0 School Services platform (28-30 MN districts), not Westonka individually.

name: Harlows School Bus Svc Inc-Mt
principals: Mark Kovisto (Contract Manager, Garden Valley ID)
districts_or_customers: Multi-state contracted student transportation across ND, SD, MT, ID, and WA; Garden Valley ID location serves local Boise-area mountain districts; McCall ID location active (goharlowsmccall.com).
recent_news: Founder Harlow Hageness (b.1942) built from ND base; company remains family-owned per site; affiliated 'Harlow's Bus and Truck Sales' dealership in Bismarck ND adds vertical integration.
fit_notes: Attractive regional platform (5 states, family-owned, founder ~84 yrs old -> succession potential). However the multi-state, multi-location scale and affiliated bus dealership make this platform-sized, not a tuck-in. Garden Valley ID is one branch within a larger Harlow's network HQ'd in Bismarck ND (note record's '701' phone confirms ND HQ ownership).

name: Alpha School Bus Co
owner_or_parent: Cook-Illinois Corporation (Mundy family; acquired Alpha in 1978)
districts_or_customers: Chicago Public Schools (CPS), Community HS District 218, Southwest Cook County Cooperative Association for Special Education (SWCCCASE); HQ Crestwood IL (Harvey address is older); special-needs focus.
recent_news: Wholly-owned subsidiary of Cook-Illinois Corp since 1978; Cook-Illinois is a top-10 US school bus contractor with 700+ special needs buses across multiple IL subsidiaries (Alpha, Cook County School Bus, etc.).
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target - subsidiary of Cook-Illinois Corporation, a large multi-generational family-owned Chicago strategic operator. Cook-Illinois itself could be a strategic conversation but is platform-scale and not currently for sale.

name: Laser Transportation
owner_or_parent: independent (likely Scott Simmons, owner per record)
districts_or_customers: Twin Cities metro area; intrastate MN passenger carrier authority only; serves school routes plus charter/group/event work (bachelor/bachelorette, corporate transport per directory listings).
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER snapshot shows 23 power units, 13 drivers, intrastate-only MN authority; HQ actually at 2211 Edgewood Ave S, St. Louis Park, MN 55426 (record address mislabels as Eden Prairie). Website appears down at time of review.
fit_notes: Small independent Twin Cities operator with mixed school/charter book - sub-scale (~23 buses) but a clean true tuck-in profile if school revenue mix is meaningful. Owner-operator (Scott Simmons) suggests succession optionality. Worth a quick outreach call to confirm school-route share.
